name: Scheduled Database Health Check & Email Report
description: Runs on a daily timer to query a PostgreSQL database and email a health status report to system administrators.
plainEnglishSummary: Triggers automatically every day at a scheduled time.
Executes a SQL query to check database counts and health status.
Sends an executive status report email via Gmail.

requiredUserInputs.label: Admin Email
requiredUserInputs.setupGuide: Enter the administrator email address to receive daily reports.

params.query: SELECT count(*) as total_users FROM users;
